538 ANTPSYCT_TKNG_DSCHRG_CD ANTPSYCT_TKNG_DSCHRG_CD High-Risk Drug (Is Taking): Antipsychotic (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was taking any medications by pharmacological classification, not how it is used, 
from the antipsychotic class. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
539 ANTPSYCT_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD ANTPSYCT_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD High-Risk Drug (Indication) : Antipsychotic (Adm) CHAR 1 This
